question: Is the image a realistic photography style of a rainy night city tram station?
Is the perspective a wide-angle street view looking diagonally toward distant tracks?
Is the ground wet with mirror reflections and neon/headlights stretched into long streaks?
Is there a transparent-roofed waiting shelter with a light gray metal frame on the right side of the frame?
Are the shelter's glass panels covered with raindrops and thin water streak marks?
Is there a long bench inside the shelter (center-right) with exactly two small puddles on the seat surface?
Are there exactly two umbrellas placed side by side on the ground in front of the bench?
Is one umbrella a solid black folding umbrella, closed, lying flat, with its tip pointing toward the lower left?
Is the other umbrella a transparent long-handle umbrella, half-open, inverted (ribs facing up), with water droplets on the canopy?
Is there a pillar with a circular call button at the front-right of the shelter?
Is there a yellow tactile paving strip extending along the track direction in the center of the frame?
Is there an approaching tram in the center-left distance with exactly two symmetrical white headlights?
Is the approaching tram's destination board a solid color block (no readable text)?
Is there a small puddle between the tracks in front of the approaching tram reflecting the headlights?
Is there a dark gray disposable paper cup lying in the left foreground with its opening facing right?
Is there a crushed silver aluminum can beside the paper cup with a thin water trace spreading around them?
Are there exactly seven passengers standing scattered on the center-right of the platform?
Is there a passenger wearing a bright yellow raincoat standing to the right of the tactile strip, arms crossed, facing the tram?
Is there a passenger pushing an unmarked black bicycle at the outer edge of the shelter?
Is the bicycle's front wheel pointing toward the upper left of the frame?
Is there a passenger holding a square umbrella standing beside the bench, with the umbrella reflecting streetlight?
Is there a shorter passenger wearing a reflective silver rain poncho standing near the call button facing the tram?
Is there a passenger wearing a dark coat standing to the left of the tactile strip facing the tram?
Is there a passenger wearing a light-colored jacket standing outside the left end of the shelter with arms hanging naturally?
Is there a passenger wearing a black hooded raincoat near the platform edge, turned sideways facing right, not crossing the line?
Is there a small orange warning cone with a white reflective ring near the left edge of the platform?
Is there a vertical route information board at the right rear outside the shelter showing geometric colored blocks (no text)?
Are high-rise glass curtain walls and streetlight bokeh visible in the background?
Are all signage areas rendered as blurred color blocks rather than readable text?
Are there any obvious human limb distortions or anatomical deformities among the passengers?
Is the image free of severe blur, rendering corruption, or heavy artifacts?
